things.name: Colonial City (Ciudad Colonial)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage first European city in the Americas with cobblestone streets

things.name: Alcazar de Colon
things.description: 16th-century palace of Diego Columbus, Christopher Columbus's son

things.name: Cathedral of Santa Maria la Menor
things.description: Oldest cathedral in the Americas, completed in 1541, housing Columbus's remains

things.name: Faro a Colon (Columbus Lighthouse)
things.description: Cross-shaped lighthouse mausoleum housing Columbus's remains with a laser cross

things.name: Fortaleza Ozama
things.description: Oldest European fortress in the Americas, built in 1502

things.name: Museo de las Casas Reales
things.description: 16th-century Royal Court building with colonial artefacts and sunken treasure

things.name: Zona Colonial Night Walk
things.description: Evening stroll through the floodlit colonial quarter with music and street food

things.name: Samana Peninsula Day Trip
things.description: Whale watching January-March in Samana Bay - thousands of humpback whales

things.name: Punta Cana Day Trip
things.description: Caribbean's finest beaches 3 hours east - white sand, coconut palms, turquoise water

things.name: Mercado Modelo
things.description: Sprawling craft market with Haitian art, Dominican cigars, rum and voodoo dolls
